mapper.sql: t.id, t.supplementary_no, t.order_id, t.supplementary_amount, t.currency, t.supplementary_status, t.config_version_no, t.payment_id, t.expire_time, t.create_time, t.create_by, t.update_time, t.update_by
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO vso_supplementary_payment ( supplementary_no, order_id, supplementary_amount, currency, supplementary_status, config_version_no, payment_id, expire_time, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by ) VALUES
( #{item.supplementaryNo}, #{item.orderId}, #{item.supplementaryAmount}, #{item.currency}, #{item.supplementaryStatus}, #{item.configVersionNo}, #{item.paymentId}, #{item.expireTime}, now(), #{item.createBy}, now(), #{item.updateBy} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE vso_supplementary_payment t SET
t.supplementary_status = #{supplementaryStatus},
t.payment_id = #{paymentId},
t.update_by = #{updateBy},
t.update_time = now() WHERE t.id = #{id}
